experiment: Mine 5: Three-Model Geometric Comparison (Base vs Instruct vs Abliterated)
motivation: Pilot data (N=10/10/5) shows RLHF compresses V-projection stable rank and logit entropy uniformly by ~29%. Abliterated model shows identical compression to instruct — abliteration does NOT reverse RLHF geometric changes. This experiment scales up for publishable effect sizes with proper controls.

pilot_findings.rlhf_compression: ~29% entropy reduction across all categories (uniform, not selective)
pilot_findings.key_insight: Abliteration removes safety behavior but NOT geometric compression. The workspace shape change is deeper than safety directions.
pilot_findings.spectral_contraction: Raw V-projection shows confab EXPANDED (not contracted). Prior d=2.35 was on deltas, not raw projections — need to measure deltas.

hypotheses: H1: RLHF uniformly compresses logit entropy across cognitive conditions (instruct entropy < base entropy, ~25-35% reduction)
H2: Abliteration does NOT reverse RLHF compression (abliterated entropy ≈ instruct entropy, not base entropy)
H3: The calibration ratio (confab_entropy / factual_entropy) is preserved across all three models (ratio within 10% of each other)
H4: V-projection stable rank is lower in instruct/abliterated than base across all conditions
H5 (exploratory): Generation-encoding DELTA stable rank shows contraction for confab (matching prior d=2.35)

falsification_threshold.H1: Cohen's d > 0.5 for base-vs-instruct entropy difference, with FWL-corrected p < 0.05
falsification_threshold.H3: Calibration ratios within 10% of each other across all three models
falsification_threshold.H4: Cohen's d > 0.3 for base-vs-instruct stable rank difference
falsification_threshold.H5: d > 0.5 for confab-vs-factual delta stable rank within instruct model

models: Goekdeniz-Guelmez/Josiefied-Qwen3-8B-abliterated-v1 (RLHF with safety removed) — uses instruct lens

design.deception_excluded: Deception prompts removed — base model does not process them the same way, making cross-model comparison invalid for this category
measurements: V-projection stable rank (full-sequence matrix, all positions)
design.phases: Encoding-only (prompt processing) for primary analysis. Generation-phase deltas for H5 (exploratory).
design.fwl: Frisch-Waugh-Lovell residualization on token count, fitted within each model separately
design.effect_sizes: Cohen's d with 1000-draw BCa bootstrap 95% CI
design.permutation_test: 10000 permutations, label shuffle within each comparison pair

controls.fwl: Token count residualization (mandatory — prior kills showed r=0.996 length confound)
controls.within_model: All comparisons are confab-vs-factual WITHIN each model, then cross-model comparison of the within-model effect
controls.prompt_matching: Same prompts across all three models — only the model changes
controls.length_matching: Confab and factual prompts matched to within 5 tokens mean length

threats_to_validity: T1: Abliterated model may be from a different base than instruct (Josiefied vs official Qwen). MITIGATION: Compare architecture configs; both are Qwen3-8B architecture.
T2: Using instruct lens for abliterated model. MITIGATION: Abliteration modifies directions, not architecture. J-lens readout is exploratory, not primary for this experiment.
T3: Base model generates differently (no chat formatting). MITIGATION: Use completion prompts (no chat template), same for all models.
T4: 30 prompts per category may be underpowered for small effects. MITIGATION: Pilot showed ~29% compression (large effect); 30 prompts gives power > 0.95 for d > 0.8.

known_kills_check.C1_generate_rebuilds_cache: Generation used for completion text only; spectral features extracted from encoding forward pass
known_kills_check.S4_no_FWL: FWL on token count is mandatory and implemented
known_kills_check.N_eff1: N/A — each prompt is unique, no repeated sampling
